task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add Product form in Vtiger CRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vtiger CRM web interface showing the 'Creating New Product' or 'Add Product' form.

task_completion.description: Enter the product name, active status, and handler
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product Name field contains 'Bamboo Standing Desk Pro', the 'Product Active' checkbox is checked, and the 'Handler' dropdown is set to 'Admin User'.

task_completion.description: Enter the quantity and stock details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields show: No of Units per Pack as '1', Quantity In Stock as '150', Reorder Level as '25', and Quantity In Demand as '12'.
The Description text area contains the specified text about the adjustable bamboo standing desk (look for keywords like 'bamboo', 'dual motor', and 'warranty').
A product details view or success message showing the saved 'Bamboo Standing Desk Pro' with the entered information, confirming the form was submitted.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vtiger CRM application, not terminal windows executing database queries or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the input in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into genuine Vtiger CRM form fields, not a notepad, text editor, or a locally created HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the product was actually saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots must show the post-save product detail page or a system success notification, rather than just abandoning the filled-out form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Product Name: Bamboo Standing Desk Pro. Expected Price: 549.99. Expected Qty/Pack: 1. Expected Qty In Stock: 150. Expected Reorder Level: 25. Expected Qty In Demand: 12. Expected Description Keywords: bamboo, dual motor, warranty.
